name: Breadcrumb
description: A navigation trail showing the current page location within a hierarchy.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of breadcrumb items. The last item is treated as the current page.

props.name: separator
props.description: Separator between items - a preset name (`'chevron'`, `'slash'`, `'arrow'`, `'dot'`, `'pipe'`) or any custom string.

props.name: maxItems
props.description: Maximum visible items before collapsing middle items behind an ellipsis button. `0` disables collapsing.

events.name: kb-navigate
events.description: Breadcrumb item clicked. Detail: `{ index: number; item: BreadcrumbItem }`.
